ae11f2f1-ce64-45a8-aa3e-60f0c376e665.title: Note
ae11f2f1-ce64-45a8-aa3e-60f0c376e665.text:
has player learned how to smash pots, access to ancient cavern,
completed smithing portion

42f6112f-1ce1-4e41-accf-60e54749b902.title: Otto Godblessed
42f6112f-1ce1-4e41-accf-60e54749b902.text:
Good day! You seem a hearty warrior. Maybe even
some barbarian blood in that body of yours?

options.text: You think so?
Who are you and why do you live all the way out here?
I really don't think I'm related to any barbarian.
Sorry, I'm too busy to talk about genealogy today.

bd6a90bc-e5cf-41a2-be54-66fcdd759513.title: <player>
bd6a90bc-e5cf-41a2-be54-66fcdd759513.text: Sorry, I'm too busy to talk about genealogy today.

34cb5014-dc7b-479f-8984-fcce543e176a.title: Otto Godblessed
34cb5014-dc7b-479f-8984-fcce543e176a.text:
Well then, we will talk when you learn to be less
impetuous.

ad8e2cc8-1187-4f44-bbea-4447af538fec.title: <player>
ad8e2cc8-1187-4f44-bbea-4447af538fec.text: I really don't think I'm related to any barbarian.

0f6514b2-429c-4e91-a037-7990bf98135d.title: Otto Godblessed
0f6514b2-429c-4e91-a037-7990bf98135d.text: Your scepticism will be your loss.

84c0736a-eb54-4ea3-956b-f761403e61be.title: Otto Godblessed
84c0736a-eb54-4ea3-956b-f761403e61be.text:
Good day! You seem a hearty warrior. Maybe even
some barbarian blood in that body of yours?

5822b99e-0a64-426f-aa86-fac9f2a2b594.title: <player>
5822b99e-0a64-426f-aa86-fac9f2a2b594.text:
Who are you and why do you live all the way out
here?

18b6a700-830c-4191-a338-7de2a9c93ed4.title: Otto Godblessed
18b6a700-830c-4191-a338-7de2a9c93ed4.text:
Me? I am Otto, known as the Godblessed. I follow the
ways of our barbarian ancestors, communing with the
spirits of the dead and teaching their ways to worthy
disciples.

d1789afb-cd1e-4f08-bc87-5c01143f62c1.title: Otto Godblessed
d1789afb-cd1e-4f08-bc87-5c01143f62c1.text:
Perhaps you could be one of them. You look a likely
sort to learn of these ways. As I say, you might even
have a bit of barbarian blood hidden away in you.

options.text: You think so?
I really don't think I'm related to any barbarian.

e060b43c-899d-4766-87b5-6be41ac29d34.title: Otto Godblessed
e060b43c-899d-4766-87b5-6be41ac29d34.text:
Who can tell? My forefathers weren't averse to
travelling, so it is possible. They tended to cause too
much trouble in your so-called civilised lands, however,
so most returned to their ancestral homes.

66756ea8-d278-409a-ab16-9db3a8dbe0c6.title: Otto Godblessed
66756ea8-d278-409a-ab16-9db3a8dbe0c6.text:
In any case, given you seem the type, I think you are
ready to learn our more secret tribal feats for yourself.

0bf62df3-5e45-4999-889b-2536e6b35f8f.title: <player>
0bf62df3-5e45-4999-889b-2536e6b35f8f.text:
Oh, that sounds interesting. What sort of skills would
these be?

342fbc4b-6def-4f83-b5ec-b84ac028b9b6.title: Otto Godblessed
342fbc4b-6def-4f83-b5ec-b84ac028b9b6.text:
To begin with, I can supply knowledge in the ways of
firemaking, our special rod fishing tricks, a selection of
spear skills and our agricultural techniques.

a62c3924-efb4-4367-9845-c9c098a5dae3.title: <player>
a62c3924-efb4-4367-9845-c9c098a5dae3.text:
There are more advanced stages though, going by your
description?

01055c3c-86d0-440b-9736-babd457292f6.title: Otto Godblessed
01055c3c-86d0-440b-9736-babd457292f6.text:
Your perception is creditable. I can eventually teach of
more advanced firemaking techniques, and the rod
fishing skills are but a preliminary to our special potions
and brews.

20370997-67ac-4a17-80de-758e628c33f5.title: Otto Godblessed
20370997-67ac-4a17-80de-758e628c33f5.text:
These secrets must, however, wait until you have
mastered the basics.

ab240405-538a-4885-97d2-889f2633d106.title: Note
ab240405-538a-4885-97d2-889f2633d106.text:
quest uses character stats for each part of the quest
this allows for doing the quest in any order

277bf812-686e-4e2b-892c-447c750e9d08.title: Note
277bf812-686e-4e2b-892c-447c750e9d08.text:
Gonna try creating a system of character stats to
true and false as a progression system to hopefully
allow for doing the quest in any order.. 
Heres hoping

c44a8eec-c81c-40d3-b9bf-7254e9def0b8.title: Otto Godblessed
c44a8eec-c81c-40d3-b9bf-7254e9def0b8.text:
Good day to you, hearty warrior! May the spirits guide
you.

fa31d4f5-6910-4d92-9206-0b5e43ee490a.title: Otto Godblessed
fa31d4f5-6910-4d92-9206-0b5e43ee490a.text:
Good day to you, hearty warrior! May the spirits guide
you.

5846542c-e833-4ef4-9432-987f2ff654a8.title: <player>
5846542c-e833-4ef4-9432-987f2ff654a8.text: What can I learn about the use of a fishing rod?

81bfce68-a6a8-488f-a280-72cc2df6eceb.title: Otto Godblessed
81bfce68-a6a8-488f-a280-72cc2df6eceb.text:
While you civilised folk use small, weak fishing rods, we
barbarians are skilled with heavier tackle. We fish in the
lake nearby.

3419ea14-23f7-4b73-bd76-44cbad6bf8da.title: <player>
3419ea14-23f7-4b73-bd76-44cbad6bf8da.text: So can you teach me of your methods?

1fae6ee0-ff08-447e-b681-d91744427011.title: Otto Godblessed
1fae6ee0-ff08-447e-b681-d91744427011.text:
Certainly. Take the rod from under my bed and fish in
the lake. When you have caught a few fish, I am sure
you will be ready to talk more with me.

8e75d159-5aff-4fbe-85b8-b911b8540aac.title: Otto Godblessed
8e75d159-5aff-4fbe-85b8-b911b8540aac.text:
You will know when you are ready, since inspiration will
fill your mind.

de2d3054-9451-4810-a09d-54ff0c53a8be.title: <player>
de2d3054-9451-4810-a09d-54ff0c53a8be.text: So I can obtain new foods from these fishing spots?

10db9e86-a5f9-460a-8cb2-a28a5f31f8b7.title: Otto Godblessed
10db9e86-a5f9-460a-8cb2-a28a5f31f8b7.text:
We do not use these fish quite as you might expect.
When you return we can speak more of this matter.

options.text: I seek more knowledge.
I have no more questions at this time.

7dae3967-eee1-4162-8e2a-5241d5343bef.title: <player>
7dae3967-eee1-4162-8e2a-5241d5343bef.text: I have no more questions at this time.

960573b6-a3cb-4d01-9f0d-5c335d4e8f15.title: <player>
960573b6-a3cb-4d01-9f0d-5c335d4e8f15.text: What can I learn about the use of a fishing rod?

cd0a7ae8-fc8b-4298-bdf2-6f8b4fa47e1f.title: Otto Godblessed
cd0a7ae8-fc8b-4298-bdf2-6f8b4fa47e1f.text:
Alas, I do not sense that you have been successful in
your fishing yet. The look in your eyes is not that of
the osprey.

2f8b7433-115f-48db-9df1-b0a549dfc44e.title: Otto Godblessed
2f8b7433-115f-48db-9df1-b0a549dfc44e.text:
Legendary birds, which the ignorant call eagles. They
prey upon fish. Do as they do to gain inspiration.

82904b4e-0f9b-48d7-b070-b21144a07bc7.title: Note
82904b4e-0f9b-48d7-b070-b21144a07bc7.text:
if you do not meet the requirements, you can still talk to him and
he'll give you the tasks, but you won't be able to complete them

eccf812d-0f90-44e9-af68-1949dae39f7f.title: Note
eccf812d-0f90-44e9-af68-1949dae39f7f.text: have you already talked about fishing?

3c139069-7cf8-4f77-924b-9c7628b7310b.title: <player>
3c139069-7cf8-4f77-924b-9c7628b7310b.text: How can I use my strength in the ways of agriculture?

1ba513a0-8dbf-4b6b-afb5-355fc6cff765.title: Otto Godblessed
1ba513a0-8dbf-4b6b-afb5-355fc6cff765.text:
Ah, so you wish to get your hands dirty? I can teach
you how to plant seeds without the use of a seed dibber.

ffe4d928-e578-4560-9906-247a2b7ae670.title: <player>
ffe4d928-e578-4560-9906-247a2b7ae670.text: I can handle a little bit of muck. How does this work?

4f67d807-5541-4a67-b6a6-816d27d19520.title: Otto Godblessed
4f67d807-5541-4a67-b6a6-816d27d19520.text:
The difficulty in this method is providing enough force
to deeply root the seed in the ground, yet with enough
care so that the the seed itself is not damaged.

7063d8a9-4633-4cf1-b900-d5ea406dd811.title: Otto Godblessed
7063d8a9-4633-4cf1-b900-d5ea406dd811.text:
Practice this. You might fail at first, especially if like
many a barbarian, you are not used to holding back.
Indeed, it may be wise to avoid using seeds you are
not willing to lose.

d69bad37-c7f3-4b46-ac7c-31251d0e2326.title: Otto Godblessed
d69bad37-c7f3-4b46-ac7c-31251d0e2326.text: Remember to be calm, and good luck.

7f650677-c01d-4c84-893b-904e7c36ebf2.title: <player>
7f650677-c01d-4c84-893b-904e7c36ebf2.text: How can I use my strength in the ways of agriculture?

804a06b1-8f20-49e7-aaa2-35f6b86bef62.title: Otto Godblessed
804a06b1-8f20-49e7-aaa2-35f6b86bef62.text:
I see you have yet to be successful in planting a seed
with your fists.

5a892a25-f614-4d9e-8c35-631675ef3943.title: <player>
5a892a25-f614-4d9e-8c35-631675ef3943.text:
It's definitely one of the more delicate tasks you have
provided me.

2354064a-ed6c-44d1-b197-ce9e0f09bda2.title: Otto Godblessed
2354064a-ed6c-44d1-b197-ce9e0f09bda2.text: Remember to be calm, and good luck.

6c55b8f7-9b0d-47df-b9eb-7a2ab1eb382c.title: <player>
6c55b8f7-9b0d-47df-b9eb-7a2ab1eb382c.text:
I'm ready for your firemaking wisdom. Please instruct
me.

ad56715e-2229-44dd-a11b-6f39aa004db5.title: Otto Godblessed
ad56715e-2229-44dd-a11b-6f39aa004db5.text:
The first point in your progression is that of lighting
fires without a tinderbox.

4558ad10-a41e-431c-bf7b-f5a173a5005f.title: <player>
4558ad10-a41e-431c-bf7b-f5a173a5005f.text: That sounds pretty useful. Tell me more.

ab7e0b1a-e0b6-40ef-af0c-5b7bc132e440.title: Otto Godblessed
ab7e0b1a-e0b6-40ef-af0c-5b7bc132e440.text:
For this process you will require a strung bow. You
use the bow to quickly rotate pieces of wood against one
another. As you rub the wood, it becomes hot,
eventually springing into flame.

e72b36ca-dd0d-4167-8a49-6d017ed7da00.title: Otto Godblessed
e72b36ca-dd0d-4167-8a49-6d017ed7da00.text:
The spirits will aid you. The power they supply will
guide your hands. Go and benefit from their guidance
upon oak logs.

e2856649-27f6-480f-bbbc-bad67ecc4f88.title: <player>
e2856649-27f6-480f-bbbc-bad67ecc4f88.text:
I'm ready for your firemaking wisdom. Please instruct
me.

a5e6ddba-d5a1-42aa-aee5-9c1ffdf58f1f.title: Otto Godblessed
a5e6ddba-d5a1-42aa-aee5-9c1ffdf58f1f.text: By now you know my response.

00005f8b-addd-4eff-982a-70f2d39e60dd.title: <player>
00005f8b-addd-4eff-982a-70f2d39e60dd.text: Go and light some oak logs using a strung bow?

d532ee11-7ff6-47bb-af71-780c40796f1e.title: <player>
d532ee11-7ff6-47bb-af71-780c40796f1e.text: Please teach me of your cunning with harpoons.

aef98480-cb6b-4329-999f-59f304da6eab.title: Otto Godblessed
aef98480-cb6b-4329-999f-59f304da6eab.text:
To learn more of such as tool, you must first focus
your studies on those fish that the tool is used to catch.

72976259-3daa-4122-ba64-d4f21f12e0f4.title: Otto Godblessed
72976259-3daa-4122-ba64-d4f21f12e0f4.text:
You must catch fish which are usually harpooned,
without a harpoon. You will be using your skill and
strength.

e3dbe5e8-718f-488a-aebe-c2515f6a5e1d.title: <player>
e3dbe5e8-718f-488a-aebe-c2515f6a5e1d.text: How do you expect me to do that?

aaf4c1e8-2c97-499c-9e1e-802ad4006227.title: Otto Godblessed
aaf4c1e8-2c97-499c-9e1e-802ad4006227.text:
Use your arm as bait. Wriggle your fingers as if they
are a tasty snack and hungry tuna and swordfish will
throng to be caught by you.

bef93e15-eeb1-4798-a70c-77eaba825979.title: <player>
bef93e15-eeb1-4798-a70c-77eaba825979.text:
That sounds rather insanely dangerous. I'm glad you
didn't mention shark too.

b9935b6e-75d0-49f0-958f-174e0705ff5c.title: Otto Godblessed
b9935b6e-75d0-49f0-958f-174e0705ff5c.text:
Oh, my mind slipped for a moment, this method does
indeed work with shark - though in this case the action
must be more of a frenzied thrashing of the arm than a
wriggle.

54f76c7f-aa6a-407d-ac91-350356564922.title: <player>
54f76c7f-aa6a-407d-ac91-350356564922.text:
... and I thought fishing was a safe way to pass the
time.

43b7c862-4b9f-4149-9f10-4e6888f9ce53.title: <player>
43b7c862-4b9f-4149-9f10-4e6888f9ce53.text: Please teach me of your cunning with harpoons.

d6460c0f-b460-4a0e-ae33-5ea8e76ebd4e.title: Otto Godblessed
d6460c0f-b460-4a0e-ae33-5ea8e76ebd4e.text:
I see you need encouragement in learning the ways of
fishing without a harpoon.

c92bb0bc-6df5-46d9-a9d7-65e273ab85c5.title: <player>
c92bb0bc-6df5-46d9-a9d7-65e273ab85c5.text:
It's not the most safe-sounding task I have ever been
given.

db70f645-5436-4a8a-9144-d0ccdd1cd0fd.title: Otto Godblessed
db70f645-5436-4a8a-9144-d0ccdd1cd0fd.text:
Neither is it the most deadly. Go now and return when
you have drawn a fish from the sea, with sheer strength
and knowledge of our scaled prey.

752f8c7b-696a-4c32-bf5b-d7332d4d34cb.title: Note
752f8c7b-696a-4c32-bf5b-d7332d4d34cb.text: unlocks ability to use heavy fishing rod

103798a2-d4c3-478e-a51f-db078ed1a441.title: Note
103798a2-d4c3-478e-a51f-db078ed1a441.text:
unlocks ability to use bare-handed harpoon
fishing method

8fd730e1-b3bf-45f1-a6fb-cb0bb6fc3128.title: Note
8fd730e1-b3bf-45f1-a6fb-cb0bb6fc3128.text: has player spoken about harpoon fishing yet?

924151a2-b272-4faa-a71a-016506f80974.title: Note
924151a2-b272-4faa-a71a-016506f80974.text: unlocks starting a fire using a bow

1a6c994d-36bd-4fb1-bcbc-0f4ed624f5cc.title: Note
1a6c994d-36bd-4fb1-bcbc-0f4ed624f5cc.text:
unlocks planting seeds without a
seed dibber

options.text: Please teach me of your cunning with harpoons.
I have fished with my hands!
Tell me more about the use of spears.
I've created a spear!
Tell me more about the use of spears.
I've created a hasta!
What can I learn about the use of a fishing rod?
I've fished with a barbarian rod!
What was that secret knowledge of herblore we talked of?
I've made a barbarian potion!
I'm ready for your firemaking wisdom. Please instruct me.
I've set fire to logs with a bow!
I have completed firemaking with a bow. What follows this?
I've created a pyre ship!
How can I use my strength in the ways of agriculture?
I've planted seeds with my fists!
Are there any other fist related farming activities I can learn?
I've smashed a pot whilst farming!
I'd better get going.

aad71546-0a08-4e0b-b5d3-20a6991db551.title: Note
aad71546-0a08-4e0b-b5d3-20a6991db551.text: has completed Tai Bwo Wannai Trio?

af04b4b1-5697-42e6-855a-575ab84c1f48.text:
You feel you have learned more of barbarian ways. Otto might wish
to talk to you more.

9b7e0e10-d326-49a6-897c-693b06debecd.title: Note
9b7e0e10-d326-49a6-897c-693b06debecd.text:
on success of catching any harpoon fish (tuna, swordfish or shark)
bare-handed, message pops up in chat

74935964-45e5-4a1a-a55c-4a45ce9b9b58.title: <player>
74935964-45e5-4a1a-a55c-4a45ce9b9b58.text: I have fished with my hands!

565c2b28-d512-41de-aaaa-ef42fbc52217.title: Otto Godblessed
565c2b28-d512-41de-aaaa-ef42fbc52217.text:
I sense you have more understanding of harpoons
through your studies.

85708bfa-3d6f-4934-9ea6-3fdb93a7a3d1.title: <player>
85708bfa-3d6f-4934-9ea6-3fdb93a7a3d1.text:
Well it was interesting, can I move on to more sane
hobbies now?

deeb05e7-d550-4b64-9896-93c0d95803ce.title: Otto Godblessed
deeb05e7-d550-4b64-9896-93c0d95803ce.text:
Nothing is sane when one is born knowing only certain
death. The spirits approve of you however, so death is
on your side.

a2efb748-bc45-494f-8170-ca3f39bae912.title: <player>
a2efb748-bc45-494f-8170-ca3f39bae912.text: What is that supposed to mean?

7cd92192-7fbb-4ddc-97ea-fd8bfb6b3fe4.title: Otto Godblessed
7cd92192-7fbb-4ddc-97ea-fd8bfb6b3fe4.text:
I mean that when you eventually die and find peace, at
least the spirits you encounter will be your friends. Atlas
for you adventurous sort, the natural ways of passing
are close to impossible.

cfdb8c29-1273-4722-9c1c-c0b6b8198183.title: <player>
cfdb8c29-1273-4722-9c1c-c0b6b8198183.text: Tell me more about the use of spears.

f8a7664e-3521-405a-a27f-967624fcce44.title: Otto Godblessed
f8a7664e-3521-405a-a27f-967624fcce44.text:
The next step is to manufacture a spear, suitable for
combat. To do so, you must speak with our distant
cousins on Karamja, in the village of Tai Bwo Wannai.

fff5ef78-cd87-4ee6-8a42-64402bb1765d.title: <player>
fff5ef78-cd87-4ee6-8a42-64402bb1765d.text:
Couldn't you just take a bribe or something? I am sure
you could do with some cash.

e560b6fd-96d4-45dd-8847-a94f8c1e67fb.title: Otto Godblessed
e560b6fd-96d4-45dd-8847-a94f8c1e67fb.text:
I am afraid this is a vital step. The spirits foresee that
your understanding of spears will increase through
your journey there. You may not progress in the use
of spears until you have completed this mission.

62076844-89e6-4270-836e-44bb43c7634a.title: Otto Godblessed
62076844-89e6-4270-836e-44bb43c7634a.text:
Many warriors complain that spears are difficult to find.
We barbarians thus forge our own.

4c59572c-500d-44d1-b1ce-4689b6a986b7.title: <player>
4c59572c-500d-44d1-b1ce-4689b6a986b7.text:
Can I just use some metal on an anvil, or is there
something else involved?

44a60517-3b65-40cc-84e2-99345205c56d.title: Otto Godblessed
44a60517-3b65-40cc-84e2-99345205c56d.text:
If you use our special barbarian anvil here, you will
find it ideal. Other anvils are not sturdy enough or
shaped appropriately for the forging work involved.
Make any of our spears and return.

78320290-0da2-4d9b-9485-80c608b1d18e.title: Note
78320290-0da2-4d9b-9485-80c608b1d18e.text: task: create a spear using the barbarian anvil.

e84f5f45-d4b9-4ea8-a48f-64e01767878f.title: Note
e84f5f45-d4b9-4ea8-a48f-64e01767878f.text: on success of making a spear, message pops up.

80fb1e43-4336-4afa-bbfe-3caf77f81728.text:
You feel you have learned more of barbarian ways. Otto might wish
to talk to you more.

05f7c622-6877-4082-9fc7-3f99108775ed.title: Otto Godblessed
05f7c622-6877-4082-9fc7-3f99108775ed.text:
The manufacture of spears is now yours as a speciality.
Use your skill well.

9bd5ce4d-1a38-440c-b107-80d52d6b0b26.title: Otto Godblessed
9bd5ce4d-1a38-440c-b107-80d52d6b0b26.text:
Note well that you will require wood for the spear 
shafts; the quality of wood must be similar to that of
 the metal involved.

0be40ee7-9656-483d-b694-e791723d71be.title: <player>
0be40ee7-9656-483d-b694-e791723d71be.text: What of the one handed spears of which you spoke?

ae0f8e0b-9bb0-4ffd-9b57-6c394cf60e45.title: Otto Godblessed
ae0f8e0b-9bb0-4ffd-9b57-6c394cf60e45.text:
The next step is to manufacture a one-handed version
of a spear, suitable for combat. Such a spear is known
to us as a hasta.

d42e230a-3f81-4bf0-a2d3-9110c0ab28a1.title: <player>
d42e230a-3f81-4bf0-a2d3-9110c0ab28a1.text: Can't I just pick one up and use it in one hand?

3c777755-176e-4475-80f9-c21936a397c8.title: Otto Godblessed
3c777755-176e-4475-80f9-c21936a397c8.text:
You may try, but the process involves a differently
balanced spear. A normal one is unlikely to benefit you.

52224807-6ae9-4c02-af91-c937dcbf3bb3.title: Otto Godblessed
52224807-6ae9-4c02-af91-c937dcbf3bb3.text:
Before you may use such a weapon in anger, you
must make an example. Only then will you fully
understand the poise and techniques involved.

09613688-a428-4312-9141-9898f2d064a2.title: <player>
09613688-a428-4312-9141-9898f2d064a2.text: So I must creat a hasta? I see. This makes sense.

fd2af798-b46f-43c0-8f28-243eecb0e820.title: Otto Godblessed
fd2af798-b46f-43c0-8f28-243eecb0e820.text:
Indeed. You may use our special anvil for this spear
type too. The ways of black and dragon hastae are
beyond our knowledge, however.

dead798b-d553-4ae2-b01d-7bfc06c9fdaf.title: Note
dead798b-d553-4ae2-b01d-7bfc06c9fdaf.text: on success of making a hasta, message pops up.

145e698b-b69d-4271-85f2-73e2d9e6f648.text:
You feel you have learned more of barbarian ways.
 Otto might wish to talk to you more.

76854229-a25a-4981-afe1-d2209bacad92.title: Otto Godblessed
76854229-a25a-4981-afe1-d2209bacad92.text: And so you are approaching readiness.

c3455280-2bbb-4df2-b9f6-4a8882ab6695.title: <player>
c3455280-2bbb-4df2-b9f6-4a8882ab6695.text: If I may ask, readiness for what?

d16543e2-49ea-439f-b0c2-6a3583071973.title: Otto Godblessed
d16543e2-49ea-439f-b0c2-6a3583071973.text:
To live life to it's fullest of course - that you may be a
peaceful spirit when your time ends.

6a6bdb1f-0c58-4d49-93b5-2c00f59a9089.title: Order of Stat Steps
6a6bdb1f-0c58-4d49-93b5-2c00f59a9089.text:
should match up with the main Option Bubble:

Part one - 10

Part two - 7

Part three - 7

Part four - 7

(when all 4 parts are complete, then Otto
should able to congratulate player and
complete the quest)

ecc3de51-6156-46f9-b614-53dba4a375b1.title: Ability Unlocks
ecc3de51-6156-46f9-b614-53dba4a375b1.text:
Bare-handed-fishing
Heavy-rod-fishing
Bow-firemaking
Seedless-dibber
smith-spears
smith-hastas
potion-mixes
pyres
smash-pots

f61b0075-aa56-40aa-afcf-d3094b957d39.title: Note
f61b0075-aa56-40aa-afcf-d3094b957d39.text:
WiP
Will have to revisit once we go the
Tai Bwo Wannai trio quest

e1ab337e-8301-4d16-af1e-1fd8c5d34015.title: <player>
e1ab337e-8301-4d16-af1e-1fd8c5d34015.text: I've fished with a barbarian rod!

02ae8312-ecc0-4aa4-bcd9-1b8f7c2e9288.title: Otto Godblessed
02ae8312-ecc0-4aa4-bcd9-1b8f7c2e9288.text:
Your mind is as clear as the waters you have fished.
This is good.

ff39bc89-f62b-4463-9899-80ebfd3811f6.title: <player>
ff39bc89-f62b-4463-9899-80ebfd3811f6.text:
So what do I do with these fish? They are all bloated
and so nasty looking that even a starving vulture
wouldn't eat one.

493f8bbf-55d1-492a-afaf-cf9cf3d8b9ff.title: Otto Godblessed
493f8bbf-55d1-492a-afaf-cf9cf3d8b9ff.text:
Patience young one. These are fish which are fat with
eggs rather than fat of flesh. It is these eggs that are
the thing to make use of.

c98fa505-465c-4e82-ad3f-b3f5b988b972.title: <player>
c98fa505-465c-4e82-ad3f-b3f5b988b972.text:
What was that secret knowledge of herblore we talked
of?

30f5628c-762f-42d8-aea5-6570682142b3.title: Otto Godblessed
30f5628c-762f-42d8-aea5-6570682142b3.text:
The secret is linked to the fish in the lake nearby. If
you use your knife upon them, several new fishy items
will be produced. Fish parts can be used as bait, but the
roe and caviar is more useful for us.

3fc2a1f5-deec-4985-9192-56b1ff713fc4.title: Otto Godblessed
3fc2a1f5-deec-4985-9192-56b1ff713fc4.text:
Certainly not. Mixing these items with two dose potions
is what should be done. This results in a nutritious slop,
perfect for healing as well as imparting the effect of the
potion.

adb9f4a9-49d3-4816-8f2d-531026e55761.title: Otto Godblessed
adb9f4a9-49d3-4816-8f2d-531026e55761.text:
Roe can only be used for some of the more easily
combined mixes, while caviar may be used for any of
the mixes of which I am aware.

d96d6778-b2ce-466f-bbea-502d01bd9c41.title: <player>
d96d6778-b2ce-466f-bbea-502d01bd9c41.text: What if I only have four dose potions?

37d4cfc9-7c6c-4390-8e9a-4cf8e5aec445.title: Otto Godblessed
37d4cfc9-7c6c-4390-8e9a-4cf8e5aec445.text:
You are able to decant a four dose potion into an
empty vial, thus giving two potions of two doses. This
will aid you in the process.

7d87d2b6-585e-4c84-ac45-0d8bd4f28027.title: <player>
7d87d2b6-585e-4c84-ac45-0d8bd4f28027.text:
I guess you just want me to go away and make one of
these potions?

d6c291fb-f5e1-461e-81b3-019fd3fc165f.title: Otto Godblessed
d6c291fb-f5e1-461e-81b3-019fd3fc165f.text:
Have I become so predictable? But yes, I do indeed
require a potion. It is of the highest importance that
you bring me a lesser attack potion combined with fish
roe.

6364717e-562c-4541-ab0d-568c87e83900.title: <player>
6364717e-562c-4541-ab0d-568c87e83900.text:
What was that secret knowledge of herblore we talked
of?

3c2f2a5a-0556-4dc5-a53b-1e2cb0dc1e0f.title: <player>
3c2f2a5a-0556-4dc5-a53b-1e2cb0dc1e0f.text: What was it you needed again?

f0ed9e29-9604-4c2a-8d5c-b009b0f97758.title: Otto Godblessed
f0ed9e29-9604-4c2a-8d5c-b009b0f97758.text:
Bring me a lesser attack potion combined with fish roe.
There is more importance in this than you will ever
know.

e7272385-9a3d-4556-849e-987ae20a8f74.title: Note
e7272385-9a3d-4556-849e-987ae20a8f74.text: unlocks the abilty to make potion mixes

a6f49880-e90c-4d31-b830-b380188f5493.title: Otto Godblessed
a6f49880-e90c-4d31-b830-b380188f5493.text:
I will take that off your hands now. I will say no more
than that I am eternally grateful.

a7324087-5d00-4b61-9582-0df7736e4b91.title: <player>
a7324087-5d00-4b61-9582-0df7736e4b91.text:
I feel I am missing some vital information about your
need for this potion, though I often have this suspicion.

adccd53a-de7d-4e76-b7b6-28a312e1c21b.title: Otto Godblessed
adccd53a-de7d-4e76-b7b6-28a312e1c21b.text:
I will not reveal all of my private matters to you. Some
secrets are best kept rather than revealed.

d14b5c62-da63-4fed-afc2-24a6fcfae631.title: <player>
d14b5c62-da63-4fed-afc2-24a6fcfae631.text: I've set fire to logs with a bow!

df347b3c-23d6-4c3d-86a5-000cb258e96d.title: <player>
df347b3c-23d6-4c3d-86a5-000cb258e96d.text:
I have completed firemaking with a bow. What follows
this?

8a219b79-57fb-457d-ab05-0c847011293a.title: Otto Godblessed
8a219b79-57fb-457d-ab05-0c847011293a.text:
The next stage is quite complex, so listen well. In order
to send our ancestors into the spirit world, their mortal
remains must be burned with due ceremony.

74d879cf-2fdc-471c-80fb-81a5baff7080.title: Otto Godblessed
74d879cf-2fdc-471c-80fb-81a5baff7080.text:
This can only be done close to the water on the shore
of the lake, just to our north-east. You will recognise
the correct places by the ashes to be seen there.

b2ad0668-f3ef-4a57-9c63-37de362d9d7f.title: Otto Godblessed
b2ad0668-f3ef-4a57-9c63-37de362d9d7f.text:
You will need to construct a small ship by using an axe
upon logs in this area, then add the bones of a long
dead barbarian hero.

2673140b-2c98-4349-b083-5203ad68a447.title: <player>
2673140b-2c98-4349-b083-5203ad68a447.text: Where do I obtain these bones?

b6597d57-9489-4a08-8adf-7a34f8b946db.title: Otto Godblessed
b6597d57-9489-4a08-8adf-7a34f8b946db.text:
From the caverns beneath this lake. Many of our
ancestors travelled to these caverns in order to hunt
for glory, but found only death. Their bones must still
lie inside, their spirits trapped in torment.

7e8515b3-78f8-4448-91e3-0e99d2b0eb9b.title: <player>
7e8515b3-78f8-4448-91e3-0e99d2b0eb9b.text:
So I make sure I am in the right place, then throw
these bones on a ceremonial ship before I set light to it?

35e664cb-42e5-4035-b55b-a3a57824626c.title: Otto Godblessed
35e664cb-42e5-4035-b55b-a3a57824626c.text:
Correct. The spirit will ascend to glory while the pyre
will send the earthly remains to the depths. You will also
obtain a closer link to the spirit world.

d2155c67-d722-4bbe-95b5-832a71cfb94a.title: Otto Godblessed
d2155c67-d722-4bbe-95b5-832a71cfb94a.text:
During this heightened contact, any bones you bury
will have increased importance to the gods. The number
of bones that may be buried before the link fades will
depend on the wood used.

7641af6c-2136-41e6-9499-bcd3e1a467ec.title: <player>
7641af6c-2136-41e6-9499-bcd3e1a467ec.text: Is there anything else I should know?

2c179cc0-c449-4822-8722-8624399d4783.title: Otto Godblessed
2c179cc0-c449-4822-8722-8624399d4783.text:
I have little knowledge of the caverns - they are blocked
from the sight of the spirits with whom I commune. I
can only suspect that whatever slew the barbarian
heroes is indeed mighty.

1fdd455b-1c23-436e-9532-8a31e34e69ea.title: Otto Godblessed
1fdd455b-1c23-436e-9532-8a31e34e69ea.text:
I also suspect that the bones you seek might well be
very uncommon, since heroes are not found in vast
numbers.

5d4f15dd-15c7-446f-8dda-d513a625223d.title: <player>
5d4f15dd-15c7-446f-8dda-d513a625223d.text: How do I enter the caverns?

d89cc861-970a-4cf7-b2ea-8d141e991054.title: Otto Godblessed
d89cc861-970a-4cf7-b2ea-8d141e991054.text:
Dive into the whirlpool in the lake to the east. The
spirits will use their abilities to ensure you arrive in the
correct location. Be warned, their influence fades, so
you must find your own way out.

c86ad6aa-13fe-43d5-8e75-0a8ff3408208.title: <player>
c86ad6aa-13fe-43d5-8e75-0a8ff3408208.text:
I have completed firemaking with a bow. What follows
this?

3b202dde-038e-401c-b825-0a73ed8e5733.title: Otto Godblessed
3b202dde-038e-401c-b825-0a73ed8e5733.text:
I will repeat myself fully, since this is quite complex.
Listen well. In order to send our ancestors into the
spirit world, their mortal remains must be burned with
due ceremony.

398c50c7-4ff8-4c75-9692-df2d124ed39f.title: Otto Godblessed
398c50c7-4ff8-4c75-9692-df2d124ed39f.text:
This can only be done close to the water on the shore
of the lake, just to our north-east. You will recognise
the correct places by the ashes to be seen there.

c0e4fb13-5dfe-44d3-9dcd-f43fa46e9b01.title: Otto Godblessed
c0e4fb13-5dfe-44d3-9dcd-f43fa46e9b01.text:
You will need to construct a small ship by using an axe
upon logs in this area, then add the bones of a long
dead barbarian hero.

528bdf46-7d33-4851-bad4-1ada6f6fbaa7.title: <player>
528bdf46-7d33-4851-bad4-1ada6f6fbaa7.text: Where do I obtain these bones?

83907daf-61d9-48f0-bd8c-89a3c73abd46.title: Otto Godblessed
83907daf-61d9-48f0-bd8c-89a3c73abd46.text:
From the caverns beneath this lake. Many of our
ancestors travelled to these caverns in order to hunt
for glory, but found only death. Their bones must still
lie inside, their spirits trapped in torment.

54eb3f59-b744-460e-9448-cdf02a9d5b0b.title: <player>
54eb3f59-b744-460e-9448-cdf02a9d5b0b.text:
So I make sure I am in the right place, then throw
these bones on a ceremonial ship before I set light to it?

1cf5e5cf-f802-4a2e-80e4-fb46ad3057ee.title: Otto Godblessed
1cf5e5cf-f802-4a2e-80e4-fb46ad3057ee.text:
Correct. The spirit will ascend to glory while the pyre
will send the earthly remains to the depths. You will also
obtain a closer link to the spirit world.

5ed0b1f5-894a-499a-ae8f-0bae5d1dd2c5.title: Otto Godblessed
5ed0b1f5-894a-499a-ae8f-0bae5d1dd2c5.text:
During this heightened contact, any bones you bury
will have increased importance to the gods. The number
of bones that may be buried before the link fades will
depend on the wood used.

936b18ee-c779-41d8-a107-0fd18512cd80.title: <player>
936b18ee-c779-41d8-a107-0fd18512cd80.text: Is there anything else I should know?

a078101b-4d62-4cdd-88ad-0514c108aea9.title: Otto Godblessed
a078101b-4d62-4cdd-88ad-0514c108aea9.text:
I have little knowledge of the caverns - they are blocked
from the sight of the spirits with whom I commune. I
can only suspect that whatever slew the barbarian
heroes is indeed mighty.

298da501-8c71-40fc-bc30-c45d47fa6678.title: Otto Godblessed
298da501-8c71-40fc-bc30-c45d47fa6678.text:
I also suspect that the bones you seek might well be
very uncommon, since heroes are not found in vast
numbers.

4ffd748d-eaa5-45ad-b118-fbdefb21ca54.title: <player>
4ffd748d-eaa5-45ad-b118-fbdefb21ca54.text: How do I enter the caverns?

357d42d0-094c-458e-910c-09f0568d7e98.title: Otto Godblessed
357d42d0-094c-458e-910c-09f0568d7e98.text:
Dive into the whirlpool in the lake to the east. The
spirits will use their abilities to ensure you arrive in the
correct location. Be warned, their influence fades, so
you must find your own way out.

ccfa8c70-88e1-4ee8-8ca3-54b7746fa581.title: <player>
ccfa8c70-88e1-4ee8-8ca3-54b7746fa581.text: I've planted seeds with my fists!

0f845818-b3ae-452c-b690-a8e14f6ccade.title: Otto Godblessed
0f845818-b3ae-452c-b690-a8e14f6ccade.text: Yes, I sensed you had found success. Well done.

7917be24-35bc-434d-927e-b0731b0c55a2.title: Otto Godblessed
7917be24-35bc-434d-927e-b0731b0c55a2.text: Patience comes alongside a strong spirit.

363be01f-9740-4310-a6f9-1d7d7c708c09.title: <player>
363be01f-9740-4310-a6f9-1d7d7c708c09.text: I hope you're not saying I'm weak?

51cb99ca-d151-4149-99ae-3658f404fa97.title: Otto Godblessed
51cb99ca-d151-4149-99ae-3658f404fa97.text:
No child, but we all have potential to improve our
strength.

73a74957-711f-4c76-94ab-68971e735024.title: <player>
73a74957-711f-4c76-94ab-68971e735024.text:
Are there any other fist related farming activities I can
learn?

f9da81c7-17a8-4503-803c-868f2a5ed71c.title: Otto Godblessed
f9da81c7-17a8-4503-803c-868f2a5ed71c.text:
This technique fully embraces your strength as a
barbarian. Nuance is not required here. It's about the
fine art of smashing pots.

abef7c50-01eb-46f4-9362-a9b9ce52f3cc.title: <player>
abef7c50-01eb-46f4-9362-a9b9ce52f3cc.text: Smashing pots? That doesn't sound overly difficult.

fa14ea3b-d02c-4e90-956e-514d61f2dada.title: Otto Godblessed
fa14ea3b-d02c-4e90-956e-514d61f2dada.text:
The secret is how to smash them in a way that doesn't
leave debris on the ground, for that would not be of
benefit to the environment.

12946369-39d4-4c3e-af66-022f36a20280.title: <player>
12946369-39d4-4c3e-af66-022f36a20280.text:
That makes sense. I wouldn't want to be littering
shards of pot everywhere. What's the trick?

abdd3ceb-a37e-48ee-bb4f-58a3578dd542.title: Otto Godblessed
abdd3ceb-a37e-48ee-bb4f-58a3578dd542.text:
Planting a tree is strenuous work. You need to channel
this energy into pure anger. Release all that anger on
the pot that contained it, shattering it into dust!

7f399a1c-5f7d-42fd-9f80-0db73ccfcd2d.title: <player>
7f399a1c-5f7d-42fd-9f80-0db73ccfcd2d.text: I'm good at getting angry. I'll give it a try.

37667670-34d7-4248-a2ed-ce9cd61c6d81.title: Otto Godblessed
37667670-34d7-4248-a2ed-ce9cd61c6d81.text: May the spirits guide you into success.

406ae526-93b5-43cf-a767-40c6069ca18a.title: <player>
406ae526-93b5-43cf-a767-40c6069ca18a.text:
Are there any other fist related farming activities I can
learn?

c714c838-cabe-4b72-9765-15be563fd17d.title: Otto Godblessed
c714c838-cabe-4b72-9765-15be563fd17d.text: You have not yet attempted to plant a tree. Why not?

ea62cf94-2bfd-4514-842b-77ee685d6d77.title: <player>
ea62cf94-2bfd-4514-842b-77ee685d6d77.text: I've been busy doing other stuff.

f78edc10-59ec-4bdb-a8cf-23a406b84c3b.title: Otto Godblessed
f78edc10-59ec-4bdb-a8cf-23a406b84c3b.text:
You know your task. Come back when you have
completed it.

d870567e-a98e-45a7-861b-18d2b3d918d4.title: <player>
d870567e-a98e-45a7-861b-18d2b3d918d4.text: I've smashed a pot whilst farming!

d55c289e-0ef3-4b96-9f14-72a54cc31b0d.title: Otto Godblessed
d55c289e-0ef3-4b96-9f14-72a54cc31b0d.text:
I can see in your spirit that you have been successful
in your latest endeavour.

d6b3491c-a1ad-4fea-a0ce-5819f123fc82.title: <player>
d6b3491c-a1ad-4fea-a0ce-5819f123fc82.text:
I planted a tree and got really angry. The pot was
gone before I even realised.

ba1eb899-e333-4cc8-9a6d-69c03535823c.title: Otto Godblessed
ba1eb899-e333-4cc8-9a6d-69c03535823c.text: It will become more natural with practice.

c206d9aa-58c1-4058-8be3-e7f6a0e7f7e8.title: Otto Godblessed
c206d9aa-58c1-4058-8be3-e7f6a0e7f7e8.text:
Hail to you, savior of my ancestors. the spirits herald
your presence with a spectral fanfare.

fe0204ee-ed90-44e9-821f-096e1fb85372.title: Otto Godblessed
fe0204ee-ed90-44e9-821f-096e1fb85372.text:
On this great day you have my eternal thanks. May
you find riches while rescuing my spirital ancestors in
the caverns for many moons to come.

23373c4f-e0c1-4f28-8d8b-fc1fde452e23.title: Otto Godblessed
23373c4f-e0c1-4f28-8d8b-fc1fde452e23.text:
And with that, your training is done. You have gone
from apprentice, to master. Seek to inspire all with your
daring deeds and legendary feats.

de756c26-c7f4-4088-8e12-1100a9cdee96.title: Otto Godblessed
de756c26-c7f4-4088-8e12-1100a9cdee96.text:
Welcome back, friend of the spirits. I am humbled in 
your presence. You are no longer the apprentice, but the
 master. Seek to inspire all with your daring deeds and
 legendary feats.

9eb4e0f8-a1d4-4bcc-add8-0febc9b8f3ec.title: Otto Godblessed
9eb4e0f8-a1d4-4bcc-add8-0febc9b8f3ec.text:
Good day to you, hearty warrior! May the spirits guide
you.

options.text: Let's talk about my training.
Do you have anything for me?
Can you help me with hastae?
I'd like to be calmer and not smash my pots.
I'd like to smash my pots when planting trees again.
Could you tell me more of these spirits you continually refer to?
I'd better get going.

0a36c417-e529-4a08-8c07-0d0d408902f1.title: <player>
0a36c417-e529-4a08-8c07-0d0d408902f1.text:
Could you tell me more of these spirits you continually
refer to?

89281b68-3dc7-419e-a6a1-6b77bf76ec11.title: Otto Godblessed
89281b68-3dc7-419e-a6a1-6b77bf76ec11.text:
Certainly, though it is quite simple - they are the
barbarians of the past who have died in the passing of
the years. There are three categories which learned
sages claim may describe all spirits encountered.

11955ad9-a542-402e-a00c-a096125815b9.title: Otto Godblessed
11955ad9-a542-402e-a00c-a096125815b9.text:
The majority are at peace, having died with their
ambitions sated, even if this ambition was as simple as a
glorious death. They can contact those in our world in
order to spur us on to glory.

61c1cf50-eaf1-49de-bd61-eba32c3924bc.title: Otto Godblessed
61c1cf50-eaf1-49de-bd61-eba32c3924bc.text:
Of course, they cannot or will not contact all inhabitants
of these lands, for not all are worthy.

b35d80df-51ff-4e4c-859a-397bc8e2ab08.title: <player>
b35d80df-51ff-4e4c-859a-397bc8e2ab08.text:
So those are the spirits who give us guidance. What of
the other sorts?

862dfa51-ab08-4f4e-ace3-24027ab5e603.title: Otto Godblessed
862dfa51-ab08-4f4e-ace3-24027ab5e603.text:
A second category of spirit is made up of those who are
not yet at peace. However, all that is needed is for their
mortal remains to be laid to rest and they will join the
peaceful majority.

1dee84f4-249f-4001-8e88-560415524bb2.title: <player>
1dee84f4-249f-4001-8e88-560415524bb2.text:
I can see the pyres serve this purpose. The final
category is also restless?

1a29b178-a10c-42df-8401-6b839192c944.title: Otto Godblessed
1a29b178-a10c-42df-8401-6b839192c944.text:
Alas, there is a small minority who will never be at rest.
These have been slain in moments of insanity by their
brothers or by adventurers.

94fe8497-cd6a-46df-90b5-f621df0c117c.title: Otto Godblessed
94fe8497-cd6a-46df-90b5-f621df0c117c.text:
They are not at rest and will attack those they blame
for their tortured state. They are not known, however,
for being able to determine this blame with any great
accuracy, so should be considered dangerous to all.

16323bc5-d5d5-4b4e-9265-cfbaa172ae86.title: <player>
16323bc5-d5d5-4b4e-9265-cfbaa172ae86.text: Thank you Otto. It makes a bit more sense now.

eefa41fa-b374-4665-89dd-493553961a89.title: <player>
eefa41fa-b374-4665-89dd-493553961a89.text: Do you have anything for me?

048b4b39-f420-49b3-8dda-9210a7bb3d4d.title: Otto Godblessed
048b4b39-f420-49b3-8dda-9210a7bb3d4d.text:
I see you have free space and no way to record any
information you may recover from the caverns. Please
take this book as a record of your researches.

6f75d461-b770-4ba6-8dbb-00049e0166b1.title: <player>
6f75d461-b770-4ba6-8dbb-00049e0166b1.text: What kind of information are you thinking of?

dc96ba9d-ec89-48bd-866b-d05266fbb47e.title: Otto Godblessed
dc96ba9d-ec89-48bd-866b-d05266fbb47e.text:
Those who have previously entered the cavern have not
all returned. Some of them seemed intent upon
research and discovery as much as loot and daring
deeds.

53ca3616-9944-422b-b31f-4adb2e8b2a58.title: Otto Godblessed
53ca3616-9944-422b-b31f-4adb2e8b2a58.text:
It would be a shame if you were to recover any of
their notes and be unable to record them handily. I
hope the new book will give you space for such
discoveries.

2c382ae2-a625-4df1-ae4a-b62627595ec7.title: Otto Godblessed
2c382ae2-a625-4df1-ae4a-b62627595ec7.text: You will need to make some room first.

ca8a0b1a-ffee-4c45-b0ae-8470090c3be8.title: <player>
ca8a0b1a-ffee-4c45-b0ae-8470090c3be8.text: I'd like to be calmer and not smash my pots.

8a7708a8-5ff1-4e60-9b14-46339d7389f5.title: <player>
8a7708a8-5ff1-4e60-9b14-46339d7389f5.text: I'd like to smash my pots when planting trees again.

2879dd56-160d-4f23-9fc5-e70ea5155808.title: <player>
2879dd56-160d-4f23-9fc5-e70ea5155808.text: Can you help me with hastae?

59f01b48-dfed-4641-a134-51c7da71c564.title: Note
59f01b48-dfed-4641-a134-51c7da71c564.text:
BANDIT! THE NEGATE CONDITION KEEPS DISSAPPEARING.. 
SHOULD BE APPLIED TO THE 1ST OPTION FOR THE TRAINING.
THE SECOND OPTION TO MAKE IT DISSAPPEAR IF THE PLAYER
HAS THE MY_NOTES BOOK IN THEIR INVENTORY OR BANK.
